title: Weaponsmith Trades Maces!
description: A simple mod that adds the Mace to Master Weaponsmith trades.
body:
This mod is pretty simple. It adds the ability for weaponsmiths at master level to be able to trade the Mace for 27 Emeralds and 1 Breeze Rod. Please report any issues to my discord server.

**Made with MCreator**

## 
**Join the discord for support for mods!**
[![Join Our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e94fb1e2a5bedd5eb375afe2d7d060cbac174b.webp)](https://discord.gg/xnqvcNDpRV)
